threats.title: Default Configurations & Unpatched Vulnerabilities
threats.description: Using default configurations and a lack of regular patching creates a significant vulnerability. Attackers could exploit known vulnerabilities or misconfigurations to gain elevated privileges and potentially take control of the system.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting known vulnerabilities in the underlying software, leveraging default credentials, or misconfigured permissions.
mitigations: Conduct a thorough vulnerability assessment and penetration testing.
Implement a robust patch management process.
Harden system configurations by disabling unnecessary services and ports.

threats.title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
threats.description: The system lacks detailed information regarding authentication and authorization mechanisms. This allows an attacker to potentially bypass authentication controls, impersonate legitimate users, or gain unauthorized access to the system.  Without multi-factor authentication or robust password policies, the system is vulnerable to credential stuffing and brute-force attacks.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication logic, weak password policies, or lack of rate limiting.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (minimum length, complexity, regular rotation).
Implement rate limiting on login attempts to mitigate brute-force attacks.

threats.title: Lack of Data Classification
threats.description: Without defined data classification, sensitive information (e.g., PII, financial data) may be handled with insufficient security controls. This exposes the system to unauthorized access, disclosure, or theft of confidential data.
threats.affected_component: All Data Storage and Processing Components
threats.attack_vector: Unauthorized access to databases, misconfigured storage, or insecure data transmission.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme based on sensitivity levels.
Apply appropriate access controls based on data classification.
Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit.

threats.title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
threats.description: The system's architecture and components lack details, potentially leading to uncontrolled resource consumption by malicious actors. This could result in denial-of-service attacks, overwhelming system resources and making the application unavailable to legitimate users.
threats.attack_vector: Resource exhaustion attacks (e.g., HTTP floods, slowloris), denial-of-service attacks targeting specific services.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting and traffic shaping.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic.
Employ intrusion detection and prevention systems (IDS/IPS).

threats.title: Unvalidated Input – Data Modification
threats.description: The system doesn't appear to have robust input validation mechanisms. An attacker could inject malicious code or modify data through various input fields (e.g., forms, API requests) leading to data corruption, unauthorized modifications, or potentially execution of arbitrary code.
threats.affected_component: All Input Fields (Forms, APIs, Database Queries)
threats.attack_vector: Injection attacks (SQLi, XSS, Command Injection) exploiting lack of input sanitization and validation.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user inputs.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious requests.

mapped_threats.title: Default Configurations & Unpatched Vulnerabilities

metadata.error: ReportRepository.create() got an unexpected keyword argument 'format'

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class api_gateway,auth_service,database threat

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Default Configurations & Unpatched Vulnerabilities
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Authentication Mechanism
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Lack of Data Classification
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-400
    owasp: A05:2021
    threat_category: Denial of Service
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: "Unvalidated Input \u2013 Data Modification"
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
